title: Warm up
content: This slide features images associated with three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image is set within a vehicle, focusing on city-specific characteristics.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces the theme of evolution within China, focusing on development through a journey across different cities. It highlights the relationship between transportation (taxi) and urban landscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session focuses on the investigation and research of cities. It explores local features, development strategies, and the resulting outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide matches Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou with their specific development strategies. Beijing integrates technology and tradition, Chongqing focuses on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide discusses unique development strategies for Chinese cities from the perspective of taxi drivers. Emphasizes each city’s strategic approach based on local features to promote development.
